title: 11. Lyrics Window: Track Filtering
original_text: We kept the Lyrics view moving and made it track-aware. In [drumstick/drumstick_py/file.py], `TextEvent` now remembers its source track... Then in [app.py]..., the `Lyrics` window gained a `Track:` filter with `All tracks` plus one entry per text-bearing track, and it now auto-selects the track with the most text events... I updated [Roadmap.md]... refreshed the user guides... and added coverage in [test_smf_parser.py] and [test_app_playlist.py]... Verification is clean: ... 134 tests OK...
expected_subject: feat(ui): add track filtering to Lyrics window
expected_body_lines: - Preserve source track info in TextEvent via drumstick_py/file.py
- Add Track filter with auto-selection of most text-heavy track
- Prefix lines with track number in All tracks view for clarity
- Update user guides (EN/ES) with new filtering documentation
- Add tests for track metadata, selection, and filtering logic
- Update Roadmap.md to mark track filtering items complete
- Validation: compileall OK, 134 tests pass, offscreen verified
expected_command:
git commit -m "feat(ui): add track filtering to Lyrics window" \
  -m "- Preserve source track info in TextEvent via drumstick_py/file.py" \
  -m "- Add Track filter with auto-selection of most text-heavy track" \
  -m "- Prefix lines with track number in All tracks view for clarity" \
  -m "- Update user guides (EN/ES) with new filtering documentation" \
  -m "- Add tests for track metadata, selection, and filtering logic" \
  -m "- Update Roadmap.md to mark track filtering items complete" \
  -m "- Validation: compileall OK, 134 tests pass, offscreen verified"
